jobs.name: SRE Read-Only Cluster Health Check
jobs.prompt: Execute read-only cluster health and workload triage check across managed GKE clusters. Scan for failing pods, OOM events, and scheduling blocks, and open PR suggestions for any identified issues.

jobs.name: Compliance Audit
jobs.prompt: Execute fleet-wide security compliance audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/compliance_audit_sop.md' and scan all clusters for deviations from corporate GKE security and network policies, proposing fix PRs for any non-compliant configurations.

jobs.name: Fleet-wide Cost Analysis
jobs.prompt: Execute daily cost delta audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/fleet_wide_cost_analysis_sop.md' to aggregate cost usage stats across all clusters and identify saving opportunities.
